hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, os, subprocess, sys; from pathlib import Path; raw = sys.stdin.read(); data = json.loads(raw) if raw.strip() else {}; starts = [data.get('cwd'), os.environ.get('SKILL_SYSTEM_ROOT'), os.environ.get('CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT'), os.environ.get('CODEX_WORKSPACE_ROOT'), os.environ.get('PWD'), os.getcwd()]; candidates = []; [candidates.extend([p, *p.parents]) for p in [Path(str(s)).expanduser().resolve() for s in starts if s]]; adapter = next((p / '.codex' / 'hooks' / 'codex_hook_adapter.py' for p in candidates if (p / '.codex' / 'hooks' / 'codex_hook_adapter.py').is_file()), None); print('SKIP: Skill-System hook adapter not found from hook cwd.', file=sys.stderr) if adapter is None else None; sys.exit(0 if adapter is None else subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(adapter)], input=raw, text=True).returncode)"
